# Prompt Transformer
> LLM-Agnostic Prompt Optimization Engine

## Core Files
- [app/]: Next.js App Router routes
- [components/]: Reusable UI components (Radix + Tailwind)
- [lib/]: Core logic, AI SDK integrations, and utilities
- [prisma/]: Database schema and migrations
- [types/]: Shared TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas

## Key Concepts
- **Transformer**: The logic layer that converts raw prompts into optimized formats for specific LLMs.
- **Provider Adapters**: Pluggable modules for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Mistral.
- **Sentra Security**: Strict adherence to healthcare data safety (No PHI, Audit Logs via `chronicle.md`).

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js 20, Prisma ORM
- **Database**: Supabase / PostgreSQL
- **AI**: Anthropic SDK v0.39, Google Generative AI v0.24, Mistral v1.5
